patch_name: Combat Balance Changes — Realm Divided Part II
description: Realm Divided Part II Combat Balance Changes (23 February 2026) — Bows, Crossbows, Cursed Staffs, Hammers, Maces, Shapeshifter Staffs, Offhands, Armors, Shoes.

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes
sections.searchable_text: Combat Balance Changes Bows Speed Shot Move speed Cooldown Q cooldown attack speed Enchanted Quiver invisible Crossbows Snipe Shot Crossbow Cast time Damage resistance reduction Cursed Staffs Dark Matter Bounces Damage players mobs Hammers Groundbreaker Polehammer hitbox VFX Maces Battle Howl Heavy Mace auto-attack damage debuff mobs Threatening Smash Damage Shapeshifter Staffs Sinister Swipes Prowling Staff Damage Multicast cooldown Time window Tethershift Enemy shield Ally shield Offhands Blueflame Torch Damage healing bonus Armors Frost Shield Cloth Robes Slow Fury Soldier Armor no longer heals no longer toggle Shoes Blink Cleric Sandals Delayed Teleport Mage Sandals line of sight

subsections.heading: Bows
subsections.searchable_text: Bows Speed Shot Move speed 20% 5s 30% 2s Cooldown 15s 10s Resets Q cooldown Removed attack speed buff Enchanted Quiver No longer decreased damage invisible players within 6m

changes.raw_text: Speed Shot: Move speed increase: 20% for 5s → 30% for 2s; Cooldown: 15s → 10s; Casting now resets Q cooldown; Removed attack speed buff.
Enchanted Quiver: No longer deals decreased damage if the only player(s) within 6m are invisible
notes: No longer deals decreased damage if the only player(s) within 6m are invisible

subsections.heading: Crossbows
subsections.searchable_text: Crossbows Snipe Shot Crossbow Cast time 2.5s 2s Damage 418 386 Added resistance reduction 0.15 4s

changes.raw_text: Snipe Shot: Cast time: 2.5s → 2s; Damage: 418 → 386; Added resistance reduction: 0.15 for 4 seconds.

subsections.heading: Cursed Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Cursed Staffs Dark Matter Bounces 8 7 Damage vs players 98 112 vs mobs 49 56

changes.raw_text: Dark Matter: Bounces: 8 → 7; Damage vs players: 98 → 112; Damage vs mobs: 49 → 56

subsections.heading: Hammers
subsections.searchable_text: Hammers Groundbreaker Polehammer Hitbox matches VFX 0.3s dodge max range

changes.raw_text: Groundbreaker: Hitbox now matches VFX more closely (gives opponents additional ~0.3s to dodge at max range)
notes: Hitbox now matches VFX more closely, giving opponents an additional ~0.3s to dodge at max range

subsections.heading: Maces
subsections.searchable_text: Maces Battle Howl Heavy Mace Added 40% auto-attack damage debuff vs mobs 4s Threatening Smash Damage 135 142

changes.raw_text: Battle Howl: Added: 40% auto-attack damage debuff (vs mobs) for 4s
notes: Added: 40% auto-attack damage debuff (vs mobs) for 4s

subsections.heading: Shapeshifter Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Shapeshifter Staffs Sinister Swipes Prowling Staff Damage 76 90 Multicast cooldown 0.5s 0.8s Time window 2s 3s Tethershift Enemy self-shield 200 100 Ally shield 200 300

changes.raw_text: Sinister Swipes: Damage: 76 → 90; Multicast cooldown: 0.5s (global cooldown) → 0.8s; Time window: 2s → 3s

subsections.heading: Offhands
subsections.searchable_text: Offhands Blueflame Torch Damage healing bonus 0.201 0.177 25% 22%

subsections.heading: Armors
subsections.searchable_text: Armors Frost Shield Cloth Robes Slow 30% 40% Fury Soldier Armor No longer heals no longer toggle reverted

changes.raw_text: Fury: No longer heals; No longer a toggle. (Previous toggle/heal changes reverted.)
notes: No longer a toggle (previous changes reverted)

subsections.heading: Shoes
subsections.searchable_text: Shoes Blink Cleric Sandals Delayed Teleport Mage Sandals No longer requires line of sight

changes.raw_text: Blink: No longer requires line of sight
notes: No longer requires line of sight

changes.raw_text: Delayed Teleport: No longer requires line of sight
notes: No longer requires line of sight
